# Moonshine Standard Command Pack TODO

- [x] Build initial `moonshine-standard-pack`: map default command names onto admitted sovereign Moonshine binaries where possible (`moonbeam`, `bw`, `rip`, `dash`, `wall`) and leave unmapped host commands behind explicit monster-guard admission rows instead of silent raw PATH fallback.
- [x] Add Wall diagnostic topology output: `ping`, `traceroute`/`tracert`, and `wireshark` default to `.gg` topology output, with `--json` preserving the raw diagnostic JSON.
- [x] Add `.gg`-first command glam pass for `moonbeam` process snapshots, `rip` filesystem/search/text commands, `bw` binary/checksum commands, `timeout`, `wc`, and Wall DNS diagnostics.
- [x] Add read-only platform adapters for `open`, clipboard, interface/socket inspection, `sw_vers`, service/log views, and Windows-style `dir`/`where`/`tasklist` aliases.
- [x] Add guarded mutating platform adapters for Windows-style `copy` and `taskkill`.
- [ ] Finish deeper compatibility flags for host-style option parity; `pwsh` remains guarded/platform-blocked.

## Initial Mapping

| Command family | Default commands | Already admitted sovereign mapping | Gap |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Shell/session | `cd`, `pwd`, `echo`, `exit`, `export`, `unset`, `alias`, `unalias`, `env`, `set`, `source`, `history`, `which`, `type`, `command` | `moonshine` owns the session executor | Mostly added as Rust builtins; runtime alias/source mutation remains intentionally guarded. |
| System monitor | `top`, `btop`, `htop`, `ps`, `uptime`, `free`, `vm_stat` | `moonbeam` is admitted in `.moonshine` and `.moonbeam` | `top`/`btop`/`htop` route to live `moonbeam`; one-shot `ps`/system modes emit `.gg` by default with `--json` escape hatch. |
| File/text search | `grep`, `rg`, `find`, `xargs`, `cat`, `less`, `head`, `tail`, `wc`, `stat`, `file` | `rip` is admitted as the current sovereign file/text workflow hook | `rip` now emits `.gg` by default for traversal, search hits, text reads, metadata, and counts; `--plain`/`--json` remain available. |
| Binary/data inspection | `xxd`, `hexdump`, `od`, `strings`, checksum helpers | `bw` is admitted from Bitwise | Binary windows, strings, and checksum helpers emit `.gg` by default with read/transform timings. |
| App/workflow CLI | `dash` | `dash` is admitted | Direct alias added; add deeper guarded invocation tests later. |
| Network diagnostics | `ping`, `traceroute`, `tracert`, `wireshark`, `dig`, `nslookup`, `curl`, `wget`, `nc`, `ssh`, `rsync` | `wall` has `fs,net`; qspec gate probes cover model/network admission diagnostics | `ping`, `traceroute`/`tracert`, `wireshark`, `dig`, and `nslookup` route through Wall and emit `.gg` topology by default; mutating/raw network tools stay guarded. |
| Dev surface | `a0`, `gn`, `gnit`, `gnode`, `monster`, `timeout`, `cargo`, `rustc`, `pnpm`, `node`, `python`, `make` | `moonshine` can launch through sovereign PATH | `a0`/`gn`/`gnit`/`gnode`/`monster` route through sovereign aliases; `timeout` wraps child lifecycle/deadline as `.gg`; raw tool entrypoints remain guarded pending project-policy shims. |
| Platform packs | macOS `open`, `pbcopy`, `pbpaste`, `sw_vers`; Linux `systemctl`, `journalctl`, `ip`, `ss`; Windows `dir`, `copy`, `where`, `tasklist`, `taskkill`, `ipconfig`, `pwsh` | `wall`, `moonbeam`, and `rip` own read-only adapters; `copy` maps to `rip copy`; `taskkill` maps to `moonbeam kill` | Read-only aliases now emit `.gg` topology or route to one-shot graph views; `copy`/`taskkill` normalize core host flags; shell entry `pwsh` remains guarded/platform-blocked. |

## Rust-First Test Plan

1. [x] Add a Rust module for the standard command registry, with a pure function that classifies each command as `Builtin`, `SovereignAlias`, `GuardedHost`, `PlatformAlias`, or `Missing`.
2. [x] Unit-test registry classification without spawning processes: assert that `top`/`btop` resolve to `moonbeam`, binary inspection resolves to `bw`, file/text workflows resolve to `rip`, `dash`/`wall` remain direct, and unmapped host commands are never classified as raw PATH fallbacks.
3. [x] Add parser tests for `.moonshine` and `.moonbeam` registry rows so admitted binaries and caps are discovered deterministically.
4. [x] Add integration tests in Rust using temp dirs and fake `.moonshine.shims`/`.bin` paths to prove `MOONSHINE_SOVEREIGN_PATH` prepends admitted shims before host PATH.
5. [x] Add compatibility tests for shell intrinsics: session-mutating commands must stay builtins; aliases like `top`, `btop`, and `ps` should route through the registry before process spawn.
6. [x] Add negative tests for destructive or network commands: `rm`, `curl`, `ssh`, and platform-specific commands must produce a guarded-admission requirement when no sovereign mapping exists.
7. [x] Add command smokes for `.gg` output across Wall DNS, `rip find`/`wc`, `bw sha256sum`, and `timeout`.
